.file-embed.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(201, 255, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
